engineGuide.h2: Dodge Nitro Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Dodge Nitro across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 2.8L Diesel
entries.history: Mercedes-sourced OM612 derivative; reliable when maintained but turbo/injector failures drive UK replacement demand.
compatibleVariants: SE 2.8 CRD, SXT 2.8 CRD, SE 2.8 CRD 4WD, SXT 2.8 CRD 4WD, 2.8 CRD Automatic
commonFailures: Turbocharger failure at 70k-100k miles - loss of power, excessive smoke
Piezo injector coding faults - rough idle, hard starting, P0200-P0204 codes
Crankshaft position sensor intermittent failure - no-start conditions, P0335 code
entries.cta: Get quotes for ENS Dodge Nitro engine replacement

entries.title: 2.8L Diesel
entries.history: Updated ENS variant with revised ECU mapping; shares core failure patterns but improved cold-start behaviour.
compatibleVariants: SXT 2.8 CRD (facelift), SXT 2.8 CRD 4WD (facelift), 2.8 CRD Automatic (late)
commonFailures: EGR valve carbon buildup - reduced power, P0401/P0402 codes, increased fuel consumption
Fuel pump high-pressure failure - hard starting, power loss under load
Timing belt tensioner wear - critical replacement at 100k miles to avoid catastrophic failure
entries.cta: Get quotes for ENR Dodge Nitro engine replacement

entries.title: 3.7L Petrol
entries.history: Chrysler's high-volume PowerTech V6; affordable but prone to cylinder head warping and valve seat issues on high-mileage Nitros.
compatibleVariants: SE 3.7 V6, SXT 3.7 V6, Heat Edition 3.7 V6, SE 3.7 V6 4WD, SXT 3.7 V6 4WD, 3.7 V6 Automatic
commonFailures: Cylinder 6 misfire from warped cylinder head - persistent P0306 code, rough running
Exhaust valve seat recession - compression loss, valve tap noise, requires head rebuild
Oil consumption increase after 80k miles - worn rings or valve guides, blue smoke on acceleration
entries.cta: Get quotes for EKG Dodge Nitro engine replacement

entries.title: 4.0L Petrol
entries.history: Performance-oriented SOHC V6 exclusive to R/T and Detonator trims; rare in UK but commands premium replacement pricing.
commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner wear - rattling on cold start, potential chain skip at 90k+ miles
Oil pump pickup screen clogging - sludge restricts flow, risk of bearing failure if neglected
Intake manifold runner actuator failure - P2004/P2005 codes, reduced throttle response
entries.cta: Get quotes for EGS Dodge Nitro engine replacement

engineGuide.closing: Can't find your engine code? Enter your registration number above - we'll instantly identify the exact unit, its technical specifications, and live replacement prices from UK Dodge Nitro engine specialists. Every rebuilt engine comes with a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

commonProblems.h2: Dodge Nitro Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Dodge Nitro's 3.7L PowerTech V6 and 2.8L VM Motori CRD diesel dominate UK replacement enquiries. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use this section to weigh repair vs replacement costs for your specific Nitro.

problems.group: 3.7L V6 Cylinder 6 Misfire & Warped Cylinder Head
problems.h4: 3.7L V6 Cylinder 6 Misfire & Warped Cylinder Head - Why PowerTech Engines Fail
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Nitro SE, SXT, Heat Edition 3.7 V6 (2007-2012, EKG engine code)
problems.rootCause: Uneven cooling and head bolt stretch cause cylinder 6 head warping; exhaust valve seat recession compounds compression loss.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Valve Adjustment & Decarbonise - Early symptom intervention
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Valve clearance check, intake decarbonising, injector balance test
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix only if warping not yet present; not viable once head is distorted

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Cylinder Head Rebuild - Warped head repair
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Head removal, machining, new valves/seats/gaskets, reassembly with torque specs
repairOptions.longevity: Restores compression; risk of recurrence if cooling system not addressed

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt / Reconditioned Engine - Definitive solution
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt EKG engine with upgraded head, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Most cost-effective long-term; avoids repeat labour costs on ageing Nitro

problems.recommendation: On a Nitro worth £2,000-£5,000, a full rebuilt engine at £1,200-£2,800 often represents better value than a £2,100 head rebuild that may not prevent future failures. We recommend replacement if mileage exceeds 90k or if multiple cylinders show compression loss.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt EKG 3.7L engine prices for your Dodge Nitro

problems.h4: 2.8 CRD Turbocharger Failure - VM Motori Diesel Weak Point
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Nitro SE, SXT 2.8 CRD (2007-2012, ENS/ENR engine codes)
problems.rootCause: Turbo oil feed coking from infrequent oil changes; variable vane mechanism sticks, causing over/under-boost and eventual seizure.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Turbo Actuator Reset & Cleaning - Early warning signs
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Actuator calibration, intake cleaning, oil flush, boost pressure test
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable if turbo internals undamaged; temporary if vanes already sticking

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Turbo Replacement Only - Unit swap without engine removal
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Turbo removal/replacement, oil feed/return line renewal, ECU adaptation
repairOptions.longevity: Restores power; risk of repeat failure if underlying oil maintenance not addressed

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt ENS/ENR Engine - Complete solution
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt 2.8 CRD with upgraded turbo, injectors coded, full warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for high-mileage Nitros; eliminates risk of collateral injector/fuel pump damage

problems.recommendation: If your Nitro has exceeded 80k miles and shows turbo lag or smoke, budget for full engine replacement. The cost of a standalone turbo (£850-£1,600) plus labour often approaches a rebuilt engine price, with far less long-term security.
problems.cta: Get quotes for rebuilt ENS 2.8 CRD Dodge Nitro engines

problems.h4: 3.7L V6 Valve Seat Recession - The Silent Compression Killer
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Nitro SE, SXT, Heat 3.7 V6 (2007-2012, EKG)
problems.rootCause: Soft exhaust valve seats wear under heat/load; valves drop into head, causing compression loss, tapping noise, and eventual valve-to-piston contact.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Valve Lash Adjustment - Early symptom management
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Valve clearance check/adjustment, compression test, listen for tap noise
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary mitigation only; does not address seat wear progression

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Cylinder Head Rebuild with Hardened Seats - Prevent recurrence
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Head removal, seat replacement with hardened inserts, new valves/guides, reassembly
repairOptions.longevity: Effective if block/pistons sound; still risks repeat if cooling/oil maintenance poor

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt EKG Engine - Comprehensive fix
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded heads, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Most reliable long-term; avoids repeat labour on ageing chassis

problems.recommendation: Valve seat recession is progressive. If compression testing shows >15% variance between cylinders, replacement is more economical than head rebuild on a Nitro with existing high mileage or suspension wear.
problems.cta: Compare EKG 3.7L rebuilt engine costs for your Dodge Nitro variant

problems.h4: 2.8 CRD Piezo Injector Failure - Diesel No-Start & Rough Running
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Nitro SE, SXT 2.8 CRD (2007-2012, ENS/ENR)
problems.rootCause: Piezo injector internal wear causes leakage; ECU cannot compensate, leading to misfires, hard starting, and potential hydraulic lock risk.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Injector Coding Reset & Fuel System Clean - Early diagnostics
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Injector balance test, coding reset, fuel filter replacement, pressure test
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable if injectors test within spec; temporary if internal wear present

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Single Injector Replacement - Targeted repair
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove faulty injector, code new unit, leak-off test, ECU adaptation
repairOptions.longevity: Risk of adjacent injector failure soon after; labour cost repeats if multiple fail

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt ENS/ENR Engine - Complete resolution
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with new injectors coded, full system flush, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if multiple injectors show wear; eliminates cascade failure risk

problems.recommendation: Piezo injectors often fail in pairs. If one injector fails on a Nitro over 85k miles, budget for full engine replacement rather than sequential injector swaps that incur repeated labour charges.
problems.cta: Find rebuilt 2.8 CRD Dodge Nitro engines with coded injectors included

problems.h4: 4.0L V6 Timing Chain Stretch - R/T & Detonator Performance Risk
problems.affectedModels: Dodge Nitro R/T, Detonator 4.0 V6 (2007-2011, EGS)
problems.rootCause: Chain tensioner wear allows slack; chain skips teeth on sprockets, causing timing errors, valve interference risk, and catastrophic engine damage.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - Timing Chain Tensioner Replacement - Preventative only
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Tensioner replacement, chain inspection, timing verification
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable if chain shows no stretch; not a repair once skipping has occurred

repairOptions.tier: Intermediate - Full Timing Set Replacement - Chain, guides, tensioners
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Engine front cover removal, full timing component replacement, timing reset
repairOptions.longevity: Restores timing integrity; high labour cost on EGS due to access complexity

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt EGS Engine - Definitive solution
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt 4.0L V6 with upgraded timing components, bench-tested, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Most cost-effective for rare EGS engines; avoids repeat £2k+ labour bills

problems.recommendation: Given the rarity and high labour cost of EGS timing work, replacement with a rebuilt unit is often the smarter financial decision for R/T/Detonator owners facing chain-related symptoms.
problems.cta: Enquire about rebuilt EGS 4.0L Dodge Nitro R/T engine availability

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Dodge Nitro
finalCta.paragraph: The problems above represent the most common failure patterns driving Dodge Nitro engine replacement enquiries across the UK. EngineMarket connects you directly with vetted specialists who supply rebuilt, reconditioned and used engines with transparent pricing and a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Compare quotes from multiple suppliers in minutes - no obligation, no spam, just genuine options to get your Nitro back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Dodge Nitro Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Dodge Nitro and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineYears.h2: Dodge Nitro Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Dodge Nitro's UK production timeline (2007-2012), organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.preview: Launch Year: ENS Diesel & EKG Petrol Debut
years.description: The Nitro launched with two core engines: the 2.8L VM Motori CRD diesel (ENS) and 3.7L PowerTech V6 petrol (EKG), establishing the failure patterns that still drive UK replacement demand today.
keyChanges: First UK-market Nitro models introduced with SE and SXT trims
ENS diesel code featured early-production turbo and injector calibration
EKG petrol code showed early cylinder 6 misfire reports in owner forums
knownFor: Strong initial sales driven by American SUV styling and competitive pricing
Early ENS turbo failures reported at 60k miles with poor oil maintenance
EKG cylinder head warping begins appearing in high-mileage examples
years.cta: Get quotes for 2007 Dodge Nitro replacement engines
years.ticker: Dodge Nitro 2007 engine replacement • ENS turbo failure cost • EKG cylinder 6 misfire fix

years.description: Minor running changes introduced the updated ENR diesel code with revised ECU mapping, while EKG petrol continued unchanged but accumulated higher-mileage failure data.
keyChanges: ENR diesel code introduced with improved cold-start calibration
Minor interior updates but no mechanical platform changes
Owner forums document increasing EKG valve seat recession reports
mainEngines: ENS / ENR - 2.8L diesel (SE / SXT, early vs late production)
knownFor: ENR shows marginal improvement in injector coding stability vs early ENS
EKG compression loss patterns become well-documented in UK specialist networks
Timing belt interval critical on ENS/ENR; neglect leads to catastrophic failure

years.preview: Performance Peak: EGS 4.0L R/T & Heat Edition
years.description: The R/T trim with exclusive 4.0L EGS V6 and the cosmetic Heat Edition represented the Nitro's performance and style peak, though EGS timing chain concerns emerged on higher-mileage examples.
keyChanges: R/T trim launched with exclusive EGS 4.0L SOHC V6 (260hp)
Heat Edition introduced cosmetic package on 3.7L EKG platform
Detonator Edition announced for 2011 with unique badging and EGS engine
knownFor: EGS timing chain tensioner wear reports emerge after 90k miles
Heat Edition commands modest premium but uses standard EKG failure-prone engine
ENR diesel shows best reliability of the 2.8L family when maintained properly
years.cta: Enquire about 2010-2011 Dodge Nitro engine availability
years.ticker: Dodge Nitro R/T engine replacement • EGS timing chain cost • Heat Edition 3.7L rebuild price

years.preview: Final Year: Run-Out Models & Legacy Support
years.description: The final UK Nitro models carried over existing engine codes with no mechanical updates; replacement demand now focuses on cost-effective rebuilt options for ageing chassis.
keyChanges: No new engine codes introduced; production focused on clearing remaining stock
Specialist rebuilders begin offering Nitro-specific upgraded components
DVLA data shows increasing Nitro scrappage as replacement costs approach vehicle value
knownFor: Replacement economics dominate owner decisions: rebuilt engine vs vehicle value
ENR and late EKG units show best longevity when maintenance records are complete
EGS rarity drives premium pricing but also longer lead times for replacement units
years.cta: Get quotes for 2012 Dodge Nitro replacement engines

engineYears.closing: Not sure which year your Dodge Nitro was built? Enter your registration number and we'll identify the exact engine, model year, and compatible replacement options instantly - all backed by a minimum 12‑month warranty from UK Dodge Nitro specialists.

faq.h2: Dodge Nitro Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does it cost to replace a Dodge Nitro engine in the UK?
items.answer: Rebuilt Dodge Nitro engines typically cost £1,200-£3,200 for the 3.7L petrol or 2.8L diesel, while the rare 4.0L R/T unit ranges £2,500-£5,500. Supply & fit labour adds £450-£1,200 depending on region and engine complexity.
keyPoints: 3.7L EKG petrol rebuilt: £1,200-£2,800 supply only
2.8L ENS/ENR diesel rebuilt: £1,400-£3,200 supply only
4.0L EGS R/T rebuilt: £2,500-£5,500 (limited availability)
Supply & fit labour typically £450-£1,200 additional
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Dodge Nitro engine prices from UK specialists

items.question: Is the Dodge Nitro 3.7L V6 engine reliable?
items.answer: The 3.7L PowerTech V6 (EKG) is affordable but prone to cylinder head warping and valve seat recession after 80k miles, making rebuilt replacement often more economical than repeated repairs on high-mileage Nitros.
keyPoints: Cylinder 6 misfire from warped head is the most common failure
Valve seat recession causes compression loss and tapping noise
Oil consumption increases after 80k miles on many units
Rebuilt units with upgraded heads offer best long-term value
items.cta: Get quotes for rebuilt EKG 3.7L Dodge Nitro engines

items.question: What are the common problems with the Dodge Nitro 2.8 CRD diesel engine?
items.answer: The 2.8L VM Motori CRD (ENS/ENR) suffers turbocharger failure, piezo injector coding faults and crankshaft sensor issues, with most failures occurring between 70k-100k miles if maintenance is neglected.
keyPoints: Turbo vane sticking causes power loss and excessive smoke
Piezo injectors require precise coding; failure causes rough running
Crankshaft position sensor faults trigger no-start conditions
Timing belt must be replaced at 100k miles to avoid catastrophic failure
items.cta: Find rebuilt ENS/ENR 2.8 CRD Dodge Nitro engines with warranty

items.question: Can I fit a 4.0L R/T engine into my standard Dodge Nitro?
items.answer: The 4.0L EGS engine is physically compatible with 3.7L Nitro chassis but requires ECU reprogramming, wiring harness modifications and specialist tuning; most owners find a rebuilt 3.7L more cost-effective.
keyPoints: Physical mounting points are shared between 3.7L and 4.0L V6 families
ECU, wiring and emissions systems require significant adaptation
Insurance and MOT implications must be declared and approved
Rebuilt 3.7L EKG typically offers better value than swap complexity
items.cta: Compare standard 3.7L rebuilt engine costs before considering a swap

items.question: How long should a rebuilt Dodge Nitro engine last?
items.answer: A properly rebuilt Dodge Nitro engine with upgraded components addressing known failure points should deliver 80k-120k additional miles with regular maintenance, matching or exceeding original factory longevity.
keyPoints: Rebuilt units include new gaskets, seals, bearings and wear items
Upgraded cylinder heads on 3.7L address warping vulnerability
Turbo and injector upgrades on 2.8L CRD improve durability
12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard across EngineMarket network
items.cta: Get rebuilt Dodge Nitro engine quotes with warranty details included

items.question: Is it worth replacing the engine in a Dodge Nitro?
items.answer: Given Nitro values of £2,000-£5,000, a rebuilt engine at £1,200-£3,200 often represents better value than purchasing another used Nitro with unknown history, provided the chassis and transmission are sound.
keyPoints: Compare rebuilt engine cost against current market value of your Nitro
Factor in chassis condition, suspension wear and transmission health
Rebuilt engine with warranty offers predictable running costs vs unknown used purchase
Supply & fit packages simplify the process with single-point accountability
items.cta: Calculate if engine replacement makes financial sense for your Dodge Nitro

items.question: What's the difference between reconditioned, rebuilt and used Dodge Nitro engines?
items.answer: Used engines are low-mileage donor units with minimal refurbishment; reconditioned units receive partial rebuild of wear items; rebuilt engines undergo full teardown with machining and component upgrades for maximum longevity.
keyPoints: Used: £800-£2,200; variable condition, shorter warranty (3-6 months)
Reconditioned: £1,200-£3,200; wear items replaced, 12-month warranty
Rebuilt: £1,400-£5,500; full machining and upgrades, 12-24 month warranty
Choose based on your Nitro's mileage, chassis condition and budget
items.cta: Compare all Dodge Nitro engine condition options side-by-side

items.question: How do I know which engine code my Dodge Nitro has?
items.answer: Enter your registration number on EngineMarket to instantly identify your exact engine code (ENS, ENR, EKG or EGS) via DVLA data, or locate the code stamped on the engine block near the cylinder head.
keyPoints: DVLA lookup via registration is the fastest, most reliable method
Engine codes are stamped on the block: ENS/ENR (diesel), EKG/EGS (petrol)
Variant badges (SE, SXT, R/T) indicate likely engine but verify via registration
Correct code matching prevents ordering incompatible replacement units
items.cta: Enter your reg to identify your Dodge Nitro engine code instantly

items.question: Do you offer supply and fit for Dodge Nitro engine replacements?
items.answer: Yes, EngineMarket's network includes specialists offering full supply & fit service for all Nitro engine codes, with labour typically £450-£1,200 added to the engine price depending on region and complexity.
keyPoints: Supply & fit includes removal, fitting, coding and initial road test
2.8L CRD and 4.0L R/T may command higher labour due to complexity
All supply & fit packages include post-installation warranty validation
Compare multiple specialist quotes to find the best value package
items.cta: Find Dodge Nitro engine supply & fit deals from vetted UK specialists

items.question: What warranty comes with a Dodge Nitro replacement engine?
items.answer: Every engine supplied through EngineMarket includes a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty from the supplying specialist, with some offering extended 24-month coverage on rebuilt and remanufactured units.
keyPoints: Minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard across network
Warranty covers parts and labour for manufacturing or rebuild defects
Confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier before purchase
Keep service records to maintain warranty validity
items.cta: Compare Dodge Nitro engine warranty terms from multiple UK suppliers
